title: Liveblocks Starter Kit
description: Real-time collaborative product starter kit built with Next.js and Liveblocks
usefulLines: Collaborative whiteboard app with a fully-featured share menu
Authentication compatible with GitHub, Google, Auth0, and more
Jumpstart your virtual event and scale to any size with Next.js and Vercel.
noiseLines: Deploy at the speed of AI
summary: Liveblocks Starter Kit is a SaaS reference with verified Next.js codebase, App Router structure, auth flow reference. Verdict: valid.

selectedFiles.excerpt:
https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/33033422/216776250-04ef297b-f61a-42ec-a7b9-b08e46dddf8f.mp4 # [Next.js Starter Kit](https://liveblocks.io/starter-kit)

Kickstart start your collaborative Next.js app with this starter kit. ## Features - Documents dashboard with pagination, drafts, groups, auto-revalidation - Collaborative whiteboard app with a fully-featured share menu - Authentication compatible with GitHub, Google, Auth0, and more - Document permissions can be scoped to users, groups, and the public ## Get started [Read the guide](http://liveblocks.io/docs/guides/nextjs-starter-kit) to get started.
